intro.title: Customization Options
intro.description: Customization is not about adding complexity - it's about adding value buyers can see and feel.
intro.note: The strongest private-label SKUs share three traits: a distinct look, reliable performance, and packaging that communicates value instantly.

items.label: Structure
items.text: Scan engine, reading angle, stand, and cable length.

items.label: Project
items.text: Custom molds and structure changes for true differentiation.
Retail color boxes, blister packs, window boxes, gift sets, or bulk export cartons.
SKU labeling: barcodes, QR instructions, inserts, multilingual warnings.

cards.title: Compliance

items.text: CE and RoHS planning for EU and UK markets.
FCC authorization planning for US products with RF energy.

cards.note: Tell us your destination market and product type and we will recommend a practical checklist.

primary.title: Request a Customization Proposal
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Get a Branded Sample
secondary.description: Verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
